---
title: Env Codegen Module
description: Generates type-safe environment variable packages from app configuration.
---

Generates the `packages/gen/env` structure from `stackpanel.apps` configuration. Automatically enabled when any app defines environments with env vars.

## Components

- **meta.nix**: Static metadata for discovery
- **module.nix**: Options, codegen logic, healthchecks

## Generated Files

```
packages/gen/env/
  data/.sops.yaml              — SOPS creation rules
  data/shared/vars.yaml        — Shared plaintext config
  data/<app>/<env>.yaml        — Per-app secrets (boilerplate)
  src/generated/               — TypeScript znv modules
  src/entrypoints/             — App entrypoint loaders
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `stackpanel.env.output-dir` | `"packages/gen/env"` | Output directory for generated env package |
| `stackpanel.env.package-name` | `"@{project.owner}/env"` | NPM package name for the generated package |

## Usage

```nix
# The module is automatically enabled when apps have environments
stackpanel.apps.web.environments.dev.env = {
  DATABASE_URL = "ref+sops://...";
};

# Optional: customize output location
stackpanel.env.output-dir = "packages/env";
stackpanel.env.package-name = "@myorg/env";
```
